description: Triager agent step schemas. Per-issue dispatch model: one closure step (stepKind='closure') classifies a single issue and emits a closing signal whose structured output drives the poll:state boundary hook to apply labels via gh issue edit. closure_action='label-only' keeps the issue open. The orchestrator never sees triager verdicts — triager is dispatched out-of-band via .agent/triager/script/dispatch.sh.

triage.description: Single-issue triage closure response. Classifies the issue passed via --issue into kind:impl|kind:consider|kind:design and assigns a unique order:N work-order. The boundary hook merges issue.labels.add with the agent.json github.labels.completion config and applies them via gh issue edit. closure_action='label-only' is the expected default (set in agent.json) and may be omitted from the SO.

summary.description: One-line human-readable recap (e.g., 'classified #488 as kind:consider, order:3').

verdict.description: Optional verdict tag captured by the adapter via getLastVerdict(). Free-form.

closure_action.description: Optional override for the boundary hook's closure action. If omitted, the agent.json defaultClosureAction ('label-only') applies. triager should rarely set this — the dispatcher's guarantee is label-only.

action.description: 'closing' triggers the boundary hook to apply the labels in issue.labels.add via gh issue edit, then exits the loop. 'repeat' re-runs this step (e.g., transient gh failure when listing used order:N labels).

issue.description: Issue mutation payload consumed by the poll:state boundary hook. The 'labels' object follows the adapter contract: add/remove arrays of label names. labels.add MUST contain exactly two entries — the kind label and the order label.

number.description: GitHub issue number being triaged. Must equal the --issue parameter.

add.description: Exactly two labels: one kind:impl|kind:consider|kind:design and one order:1..order:9 (smallest unused). Order is enforced by the JSON Schema regex; uniqueness is enforced by the prompt querying current open-issue order labels.

remove.description: Optional labels to strip. Triager normally leaves this empty — pre-existing non-workflow labels (enhancement, bug, ...) are preserved.
